source: Vercel AI Gateway Leaderboard Export API (vercel.com/api/ai/leaderboard-export)
window_note: full available daily share history rebuilt from the official Vercel leaderboard export API
weekly_note: arithmetic mean of daily shares across the latest 7 common data dates; not weighted by absolute token or spend totals

lab_history.note: official daily Lab spend shares; Google and Moonshot AI labs are displayed as Gemini and Kimi
